name: Account Performance
query: select kpi_date, account_name, sum(spend) as spend, sum(impressions) as impressions, sum(clicks) as clicks, avg(ctr) as ctr, sum(messaging_first_reply) as messaging_first_reply, sum(leads) as leads, avg(cost_per_first_reply) as cost_per_first_reply, avg(cost_per_lead) as cost_per_lead from `tabMeta Marketing KPI` group by kpi_date, account_name order by kpi_date desc
